manifest.name: ClipBook

name: ClipBook

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
ClipBook 0.1.1 is a maintenance release focused on release provenance, Obsidian compatibility checks, and cleaner popout-window behaviour.

There are no major user-facing syntax changes in this release. Existing `clipbook` blocks should continue to work as before.

## Fixed

- Fixed Obsidian review warning around global timer usage by replacing bare timer calls with the active window timer APIs.
- Fixed popout compatibility around document containment checks by using the active document associated with the rendered element.
- Fixed release workflow provenance recommendations by adding artifact attestation permissions and an attestation step.
- Fixed build configuration warning by replacing `builtin-modules` with Node’s built-in `builtinModules`.

## Compatibility

- Obsidian 1.1.0+
- Desktop & mobile
- Theme-compatible, using CSS variables only

## Assets

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zkbkb/obsidian-ClipBook/compare/0.1.0...0.1.1
releases.name: ClipBook 0.1.1 — Provenance, compatibility & build cleanup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
ClipBook turns fenced code blocks into a compact, structured clipboard for API keys, tokens, and reusable snippets — right inside your Obsidian notes.

## Highlights
- **INI-like syntax** — `[Section]` headers, `Key = Value` pairs, comments with `#` / `;`
- **Value masking** — prefix with `!` to hide sensitive values (`sk-···f456`), click to reveal
- **One-click copy** — copy button on every row with visual feedback
- **Inline editing** — click any key or value to edit in place, changes write back to source automatically
- **Quick add** — append new entries from the rendered view without touching the markdown
- **Collapsible sections** — click section headers to collapse/expand
- **Auto-hide** — revealed values re-mask after a configurable delay or on tab switch
- **5 settings** — mask all by default, auto-hide toggle & delay, hide on tab switch, default collapsed, default mask for new entries

## Formatting Example

```clipbook
API Token = !sk-proj-abc123def456
Region = us-east-1

[AWS]
Access Key = !AKIA1234EXAMPLE
Secret Key = !wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG
```

## Compatibility
- Obsidian 1.0.0+
- Desktop & mobile
- Theme-compatible (CSS variables only)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zkbkb/obsidian-ClipBook/commits/0.1.0
releases.name: ClipBook 0.1.0 — Store, mask & copy in your notes
